reviews.comment:
Muy inaccesible para poder acceder a la estación y ni hablar si se viene para el lado de capital hay que hacerlas de dies km para ingresar y otra opción es subir por acceso a Colón y por una colectora imposible de transitar, vergüenza que una institución como el ACA no tome medidas

(Translated by Google)
Very inaccessible to access the station, and even more so if you come from the capital, you have to walk ten kilometers to get in, and another option is to go up through the Colón access road and along a collector road that is impossible to navigate. It's a shame that an institution like the ACA doesn't take measures.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXcGRxSDJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Que locura. La estación no tiene entrada para los que vienen de la mano contraría. Hay que hacer 10km. Para retomar. Arreglen ese inconveniente.

(Translated by Google)
That's crazy. The station has no entrance for those coming from the opposite direction. You have to drive 10km to get back on track. Fix this problem.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXeGNhLXJRRRAB
